toolCall.argumentsJson:
{"CommandLine":"python -c "
import openpyxl

file_path = 'g:/My Drive/UCL/BSMA/me file/Archive/BSMA_Actual Coding Sheet_v2.xlsx'
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(file_path)
ws = wb.active

# BSMA0002 starts at row 8, goes to row 11.
# The descriptors we want to copy are in columns 5 through 33
# (From 'Inclusion-Exclusion' up to 'Specific Measure Used' for Boundary Spanning)
# Actually, the blank cells are in columns 5 through 26 (Article and Sample descriptors)

# Row 8 has the data. Rows 9, 10, 11 have blanks.
for row_idx in range(9, 12):
    for col_idx in range(5, 27): # Cols E to Z
        source_val = ws.cell(row=8, column=col_idx).value
        ws.cell(row=row_idx, column=col_idx).value = source_val

wb.save(file_path)
print('Descriptors copied successfully')
"","Cwd":"C:\temp","WaitMsBeforeAsync":500,"toolAction":"Copying descriptors down","toolSummary":"Fix empty cells"}
